context: Escape-hatch artifacts and evidence-only material such as raw SQL or external snippets.

sections.content: Escape-hatch artifacts and evidence-only material such as raw SQL or external snippets. This module covers Raw migration evidence. Raw migration adds release_packets.approval_snapshot as immutable JSONB evidence. Raw SQL evidence stays in the evidence layer and is not loaded on cold start. Raw artifacts preserve facts but reduce structured traversability.

artifacts.usage: Escape hatch for SQL migration evidence.
artifacts.content:
ALTER TABLE release_packets ADD COLUMN approval_snapshot JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb;
-- Raw migration adds release_packets.approval_snapshot as immutable JSONB evidence.
-- Raw SQL evidence stays in the evidence layer and is not loaded on cold start.
-- Raw artifacts preserve facts but reduce structured traversability.
